auth.login_subtitle: Demo mode — choose an account below. This prototype does not verify passwords.
auth.login_page_subtitle: Use your username (first name + surname initial, e.g. NarisaH or Narisa H.) and password.
auth.login_error_server_unreachable: Cannot reach the server — it may be restarting. Wait a moment and try again.
auth.username_equals_name: Username is first name + surname initial (e.g. Narisa H. → NarisaH).
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 4 characters.
auth.password_invalid_chars: Password may only use uppercase letters (A–Z), lowercase letters (a–z), digits (0–9), and special characters.
auth.password_needs_mix: Password must include English letters and at least one special character.
auth.password_tip_ascii_length: At least 4 characters; only A–Z, a–z, 0–9, or special characters
auth.password_tip_letter_special: Include English letters and at least one special character
auth.change_password_intro: Use only A–Z, a–z, 0–9, and special characters (at least 4 characters).
auth.change_password_tip_length: Only A–Z, a–z, 0–9, and special characters; at least 4 characters
auth.change_password_tip_confirm: New password and confirmation must match
auth.change_password_tip_security: Do not share your password; change it immediately if you suspect unauthorized access

dashboard.title: Overview

tooltips.in_progress: Open requests — assigned, in progress, or paused
tooltips.overdue: Open requests past their response-time target. Prioritize these.
tooltips.low_stock: Items that are low or out of stock. Restock soon.

dashboard.no_active_requests_sub: New requests will show up here right away
dashboard.stats_error: Could not load stats. Try refreshing.
dashboard.active_list_error: Could not load active requests. Try refreshing.
dashboard.dnd_message: Housekeeper found DND sign. Please call guest.

requests.title: Requests
requests.view_date_aria: Pick a day to view requests
requests.filter_multi_hint: Select multiple — shows requests matching any selected filter
requests.search_pending_hint: Press Search to apply selected filters
requests.dnd_field_pending_cancel: Waiting for auto-cancel. Front desk can still mark guest reached before time runs out.
requests.dnd_field_note: Status: Front desk is contacting the guest.

timeline_events.detail_escalation_supervisor: Escalated to HK Supervisor — not started within first third
timeline_events.detail_escalation_manager: Escalated to HK Manager — not started within two thirds
timeline_events.detail_escalation_supervisor_minutes: Escalated to HK Supervisor — not started within {{minutes}} min
timeline_events.detail_escalation_manager_minutes: Escalated to HK Manager — not started within {{minutes}} min
timeline_events.detail_auto_cancel_unreachable: Response-time limit reached — no delivery after guest unreachable
timeline_events.detail_auto_cancel_deadline: Past response-time limit when marking guest unreachable

requests.empty_list_sub: Try different filters or search terms

queue.title: My queue
queue.work_zone_building_aria: Select building you are working on
queue.work_zone_floor_aria: Select floor you are working on
queue.dnd_wait_front_sub: Front desk will call the guest
queue.checklist_complete: All items collected — ready to deliver
queue.checklist_deliver_locked: Check off every item before delivering
queue.empty_sub: New requests will show up here right away
queue.filter_clear_hint: Tap the same badge again to show the full queue

products.title: Stock
products.threshold_tooltip: When "{{name}}" drops below {{n}} {{unit}}, the overview page flags it as low stock.
products.threshold_empty_tooltip: No threshold set — "{{name}}" will not raise a low-stock alert.
products.restock_qty_hint: Enter a positive amount to add stock, or a negative amount to write off.
products.restock_writeoff_hint: A negative amount removes stock — select a reason before confirming.
products.restock_exceeds_on_hand: Cannot remove more than on hand (max −{{max}})

stock.title: Inventory
stock.intro: Adjust on-hand quantities, set reorder thresholds, and register new products (admin).
stock.new_sku_hint: Fill in the details to add it to inventory.
stock.name_lang_my_ph: ဥပမာ ခေါင်းလျှော်ရည်
stock.name_lang_lo_ph: ເຊັ່ນ ນ້ຳສະຜົມ
stock.name_lang_hint: Thai is required. Other languages fall back to Thai when not provided.
stock.code_auto_hint: Generated automatically from category and department.
stock.sku_section_hint: Auto-generated from department + category + next sequence number
stock.assignee_job_titles_hint: Choose which job titles in this department can be assigned when this item is requested.
stock.assignee_job_titles_empty: No job titles in this department yet — add them under Job titles.
stock.product_category_hint: Sets the middle part of the code, e.g. GST = General
stock.product_category_service_hint: Services can use any category code for this department (e.g. LUG for luggage, or SVC for general service).

categories.modal_intro: Each category belongs to one department (e.g. Housekeeping → BED, SLP) and forms the middle of product codes like HK-BED-001. You can add categories and edit names/icons anytime. Code and department cannot change after save.
categories.empty_for_dept: No categories for this department yet.
categories.sku_preview_category: Category code being defined (e.g. ACC in HK-ACC-001)
categories.sku_preview_locked: Code is locked — you can still edit names and icon
categories.field_name_my_ph: ဥပမာ အိပ်ရာ / ခေါင်းအုံး
categories.field_name_lo_ph: ເຊັ່ນ ບ່ອນນອນ / ໝອນ
categories.name_lang_other_hint: Thai is required. Other languages fall back to Thai when not provided.
categories.code_help: Codes are frozen once saved to keep existing product codes stable. To rename a code, create a new category and re-tag products via the edit button.
categories.builtin_hint: Built-in category — name/icon are editable, but deletion still requires no products using it.
categories.in_use_hint: This category is in use by {{count}} product(s). Reassign them before deleting.
categories.empty: No categories yet — tap Add category above.
categories.error_duplicate: That code is already in use — pick a different one.
categories.error_in_use: Cannot delete — products still use this category. Re-tag them first (edit a product, then tap the middle code on the SKU chip).
categories.error_in_use_named: Category {{code}} is used by {{count}} product(s). Reassign them before deleting.
categories.in_use_modal_hint: In Stock, edit each product and change the middle code on the SKU chip to another category, then try again.
categories.error_name_th_lang: This field must contain Thai text
categories.error_name_en_lang: This field must contain English text
categories.error_name_my_lang: This field must contain Burmese text
categories.error_name_lo_lang: This field must contain Lao text
categories.edit_hint: Update all four languages so users see names in their own language

stock.details_section_hint: Enter the name — tap the icon to change it (does not affect the product code)
stock.icon_section_hint: Shown in lists only — does not change the product code
stock.icon_hint: Display emoji only — does not affect the product code.
stock.unit_lang_th_ph: e.g. ขวด, คู่
stock.edit_product_hint: Change name, icon, unit, on-hand, or reorder level
stock.no_results_sub: Try a different search term or filter

reports.title: Reports
reports.hub_subtitle: Executive dashboards, multi-dimensional analytics, forecasts, and exportable reports.
reports.customize_hint: Choose a report and date range
reports.presets_empty: No standard reports are configured yet.
reports.select_report_prompt: Please select a report using the field above
reports.export_no_table: No tabular data for this report
reports.no_data: No data for the selected period

kpi_hint.sla_compliance_rate: Share of requests delivered within the SLA target (create to deliver vs each request’s SLA). Report target is 95%.
kpi_hint.sla_breaches: Requests delivered past the SLA in the selected period — click the card to jump to the overdue table below.
kpi_hint.avg_breach_minutes: Average minutes over SLA among overdue deliveries only (on-time jobs are excluded).
kpi_hint.total_delivered: All successful deliveries in the selected period — click the card to jump to the delivered table below.

brs.sla_breach_list_desc: Requests delivered past the SLA target in the selected period — sorted by minutes over
brs.sla_delivered_list_desc: All deliveries in the selected period — newest first
brs.period_compare_desc: Compare period A vs period B using the date ranges selected above
brs.no_prior_period: No prior period data — comparisons hidden
brs.dept_compliance_desc: Bar color reflects breach rate — worst departments first
brs.sla_split_desc: Share of on-time vs breached deliveries
brs.dept_summary_table_desc: Completed jobs and on-time rate per department
brs.workload_mean_desc: Compared to team average — red = above normal load
brs.low_stock_table_desc: Sorted by urgency (fewest days left first)
brs.sla_compare_periods_note: Selected {{current}} · compared to prior {{previous}} (same {{days}}-day length — not last week or month)
brs.adjust_dates: Try adjusting the date range or filters.
brs.weekly_delivery_overview_desc: Best for up to 3 weeks — more weeks use charts and a paginated table
brs.weekly_detail_table_desc: Compact paginated list so long ranges stay scannable
brs.funnel_desc: Average duration per workflow step (minutes), including typical ranges and slower cases
brs.scatter_desc: Each dot is one staff member
brs.staff_performance_table_desc: Staff with delivered work in the selected period
brs.consumption_trends_desc: Each color = one product · X-axis = calendar week (Mon–Sun) · Y-axis = units used on delivered jobs
brs.consumption_trends_hint: Line up = more usage that week · Hover a dot for product name and count
brs.by_hour_avg_desc: Hour when the request was created (0–23) — darker = slower · cell value = avg minutes for delivered requests
brs.outliers_rule: Counted when total stage time exceeds 90 min or end-to-end delivery exceeds 35 min
brs.outliers_list_desc: {{count}} in the selected period — slowest first
brs.outliers_none: No jobs met the criteria in this period
brs.movements_by_user_desc: Stock adjustments per staff member, highest first
brs.movements_by_type_desc: Additions, deductions, and balance corrections in the selected period
brs.stock_movement_table_desc: Each stock change — click the total card above to jump here
brs.lifecycle_by_category_desc: Intake · assignment · execution · delivery · DND · closure
brs.lifecycle_funnel_desc: Unique requests reaching each stage (deduplicated per request)
brs.lifecycle_by_hour_desc: When staff actions happen across the day
brs.lifecycle_by_kind_desc: Created · assigned · started · paused · delivered · DND · cancelled, etc.
brs.lifecycle_top_actors_desc: Staff or system recording the most timeline events
brs.timeline_log_limit_note: Row cap follows the row limit filter
brs.service_only_rule_note: Catalog service items only (e.g. cleaning, AC repair, trash) — stock SKUs excluded
brs.service_only_room_chart_desc: How often each service was selected in the period
brs.service_only_summary_desc: Sorted by frequency — each selection in a request counts once
brs.service_only_requests_list_desc: Each time a guest selected a service — newest first
brs.stock_only_rule_note: Catalog stock items only (e.g. towels, pillows, water, amenities) — services excluded
brs.stock_only_room_chart_desc: How often each product was selected in the period
brs.stock_only_summary_desc: Sorted by frequency — each selection in a request counts once
brs.stock_only_requests_list_desc: Each time a guest selected a product — newest first
brs.paused_list_desc: Every pause in the selected period — newest first (one request may appear multiple times)
brs.dnd_list_desc: {{count}} incidents in the selected period — newest first
brs.cancelled_list_desc: Requests cancelled in the selected period — newest first

reports.activity_empty: No sign-in or sign-out records for the selected dates.
reports.custom_empty: No saved reports yet — open a standard report and use Save to My reports.
reports.snapshot_save_hint: Stores charts and numbers as they are now. Reopening will not change with new data.
reports.snapshot_save_unavailable: Load the report first before saving.
reports.snapshot_invalid: Cannot open this saved report (invalid data).
reports.share_dialog_intro: Choose who can open this report from the Shared tab.
reports.share_pick_user_intro: Tap a name to grant access to this report.
reports.share_pick_user_intro_staged: Select multiple people, then press OK.
reports.share_pending_empty: None selected — pick names on the left
reports.share_no_reports_users: No users with report access available to share with
reports.share_users_empty: No recipients yet — pick a user above.
reports.share_everyone_hint: Everyone with report access will see this under Shared.
reports.saved_list_search_placeholder: Search title, report code, dates, or sharer…
reports.shared_intro: Reports others shared with you and reports you shared out
reports.custom_no_blocks: Add at least one section in the editor.

section.forecast_desc: Estimates from recent daily volume — use for staffing and stock planning.
section.recent_activity_desc: Most recent events in the selected period.

insights.volume_up: Volume up {{value}}% vs previous period — consider reinforcing peak-hour staffing.
insights.volume_down: Volume down {{value}}% — review whether capacity can be reduced safely.
insights.overdue: {{value}} requests exceed target response time — prioritize backlog clearance.
insights.peak_hour: Peak demand near {{value}}:00 — align handovers and pre-stock before this hour.
insights.low_completion: Completion rate {{value}}% — review assignments and workflow bottlenecks.
insights.high_rush: {{value}} rush requests — tighter deadlines and guest expectations.
insights.forecast_up: Trend points to ~{{value}} requests next week — plan inventory and staffing early.

reports.stock_adjustments_empty: No manual stock changes in this period.

users.title: Users
users.intro: Manage staff accounts, job titles, and departments.
users.reset_password_intro: Set a new login password if the user forgot theirs. They can sign in with the new password immediately.
users.filter_dept_empty_sub: This filter uses each person's department field only. If you moved job titles only, use the sync button above or edit users individually.
users.sync_dept_from_job_title_banner: {{count}} staff have job titles in {{dept}} but their department field still differs.
users.form_features_hint: Choose which menu items this user can open. Click an icon to toggle.

remove_modal.title: Remove user account
remove_modal.intro: Choose whether to suspend access or permanently delete this account.
remove_modal.suspend_desc: The account is disabled and hidden from sign-in. History is kept and can be re-enabled later.
remove_modal.delete_desc: Permanently removes this user. This cannot be undone.

users.form_job_title_hint: Pick a preset or open Job titles to add your own. Optional.
users.form_job_title_empty_for_dept: No job titles for this department — add one in Job titles.
users.form_preview_pending_name: Enter first and last name below
users.form_username_hint: English letters, digits, and . _ - only (e.g. NarisaH)
users.form_error_username_invalid: Username may only use English letters, digits, and . _ -
users.form_error_username_short: Username must be at least 2 characters
users.form_error_username_taken: This username is already in use
users.job_titles_modal_intro: Each job title belongs to one department. The user form filters titles by department.
users.job_title_scope_aria: Choose department for this job title
users.job_titles_department_hint: Users with this title are assigned to this department.
users.job_titles_error_label_en_lang: Job title must be in English (A–Z) only
users.job_titles_empty: No presets yet — add one above.
users.departments_error_name_en_lang: Department name must be in English (A–Z) only
users.confirm_delete_blocked_intro_dept: "{{name}}" still has job titles linked to it — move those presets first.
users.confirm_delete_dept_independent_hint: Deleting a department does not affect stock. When you move job titles out of this department, staff still listed here are updated to match their job title automatically.
users.confirm_delete_staff_follows_job_title: When you move job titles, staff still on this department are moved to match their job title automatically.
users.confirm_delete_staff_mismatch_hint: {{count}} staff have job titles in another department but their department field still differs.
users.confirm_delete_blocked_intro_job_title: "{{name}}" is still assigned to users — change their job title before deleting.
users.confirm_delete_blocked_job_titles_sectio: Job titles linked to this department
users.confirm_delete_blocked_hint_job_titles_v: Job titles were moved, but the staff below still belong to this department — update each user's department.
users.confirm_delete_blocked_hint_move_user_de: Open Users and change each person's department first.
users.confirm_delete_blocked_hint_move_user_jt: Open Users and change each person's job title first.
users.confirm_delete_relocate_all_hint: Moves job titles, users, and stock/service items to the selected department. Then try deleting again.
users.confirm_delete_blocked_products_section: Stock / service items routed to this department
users.confirm_delete_blocked_hint_move_product: Open Stock and change the department on these items (not staff — this controls which department receives Quick Requests).
users.confirm_delete_other_products: Stock or service items still route to this department — update them in Stock first.
users.confirm_delete_other_requests: Active requests still use this department — finish or cancel them first (completed history does not block deletion).
users.departments_empty: No departments yet — add one above.

settings.title: Settings
settings.time_alert_thresholds_intro: Set minutes for yellow / red row alerts, auto-escalation when work has not started, and the countdown deadline on active requests (step 3).
settings.time_err_order: Times must increase in order: yellow blink < red blink < due.
settings.time_alert_admin_only_note: Only administrators may edit and save these thresholds. To request a change, please contact your hotel administrator.
settings.about_intro: Hotel operations app for requests, staff queue, stock, and reports — live updates over WebSocket.
settings.about_modules_value: {{count}} areas (overview · queue · requests · stock · reports · settings)
settings.demo_role_intro: Pick the account you want to impersonate to preview what each role sees.
settings.hotel_locations_desc: Manage public areas (lobby, restaurant, etc.) shown when creating requests. Admin only.
settings.hotel_locations_modal_intro: Each entry is a separate selectable place. Code is stored on requests (e.g. HK-LOBBY).
settings.hotel_locations_no_results_sub: Try another keyword or clear filters.
settings.hotel_locations_error_duplicate_name: This name already exists — use another
settings.places_desc: Manage hotel public areas and guest room numbers shown when creating requests. Admin only.
settings.guest_rooms_modal_intro: Add or remove room numbers. Deleted rooms no longer appear in quick request.
settings.guest_rooms_delete_confirm_message: Delete room {{number}}? This cannot be undone.
settings.guest_rooms_search_placeholder: Room, tower, floor, type, view, size, bed, connecting…
settings.guest_rooms_no_results_sub: Try another keyword or clear filters.
settings.guest_rooms_options_modal_title: Buildings, floors, types, views, sizes, beds
settings.guest_rooms_options_labels_hint: Thai + English only — Lao/Burmese UI uses these labels (falls back to English if missing)
settings.guest_rooms_options_error_lang_th: Use Thai characters in this field
settings.guest_rooms_options_error_lang_en: Use English characters in this field
settings.guest_rooms_options_error_in_use: Option is in use by guest rooms
settings.guest_rooms_options_type_hint: Type code e.g. Superior, Deluxe (must match room data)
settings.admin_hub_desc: Add, edit, and remove HK/maintenance items, guest rooms, and hotel locations.

admin.title: Management hub
admin.intro: Configure inventory, guest rooms, and hotel locations. Changes apply to new requests immediately.
admin.catalog_card_desc: Housekeeping and maintenance services and stock items — add, edit names/units, disable, or delete.
admin.inventory_card_desc: Adjust on-hand quantities, set reorder thresholds, add products, and manage categories.
admin.stock_card_desc: View on-hand levels, restock, and set reorder points for daily operations.
admin.stock_page_intro: Review and restock all items by department and status (low / out).
admin.rooms_card_desc: Add, edit, delete — room number, tower, floor, and room type
admin.catalog_modal_intro: Add items, edit names/units, deactivate, or delete (delete only if never used on a request).
admin.catalog_delete_confirm: Permanently delete «{{name}}»? (If used on requests, deactivate instead.)

quick.title: New request
quick.split_notice: Items span multiple departments — will create {{count}} separate requests
quick.no_room: Please pick a room from the list
quick.submit_blocked_out_of_stock: Some items are out of stock
quick.no_staff_available: No staff are online right now. Cannot send this request.

schedule.heading: Delivery time
schedule.daily_hint: Staff will see that the guest wants this service daily at this time
schedule.edit_hint: You can edit details until the scheduled time arrives. Assignee cannot be changed yet.

rooms.location_guest_card_sub: In-room work at the guest's request — supplies and services for their stay.
rooms.location_public_hint: Corridors, lobby, back-of-house, and other areas not tied to a guest-room floor.
rooms.location_public_card_sub: Hotel premises — lobby litter, wet-floor signs, mopping, and similar.
rooms.location_hk_office_hint: HK office, linen room, or back-office.
rooms.location_search_empty: No locations match — try another keyword.
rooms.location_scroll_hint: Scroll all {{count}} locations (rooms · offices · public areas)
rooms.public_zone_single_hint: Pick one zone only — tap a row to continue.
